name: The Great ChessBoard of Wardome
description:
You Stand in the archway of the Chessboard of Wardome. The Giant
wooden gate is rusted open.
   A narrow dirt path leads eastwards into the thick grass and the
chessboard opens up to the west.
This area is better for players on remort 7

exits.description: A dirt path leads away through the great field north of Midgaard.
The huge chessboard opens up to the west.
